title: Slide Deck Example
subtitle: Browser-first deck with arrow-key navigation and print styles.

slides.title: VPK HTML gallery
slides.body: The gallery should prove what each template can produce.

slides.title: Why examples matter
slides.body: A template catalog without examples is just a route list. The demo should show layout, interaction, and writing posture.

slides.title: Portable by default
slides.body: Each output embeds CSS, fonts, and small scripts so it can be opened outside the dev server.

slides.title: Design contract
slides.body: The portable token layer follows VPK semantic values: white surfaces, neutral text, brand blue, and ADS-like borders.

slides.title: Validation
slides.body: The deck itself is part of the test matrix: arrow-key navigation, progress text, print pages, and static checks.
